network.title: Service temporarily unavailable
network.detail: Check your connection or try again shortly.

downtime.title: Service temporarily unavailable
downtime.detail: We're having trouble reaching our servers. Please try again later.

upload.tooLarge: File size must be {{mb}} MB or smaller.
upload.unsupportedType: Only JPEG, PNG, or PDF files are allowed.

toast.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
toast.serverError: The service is having trouble. Please try again shortly.
toast.validation: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.
toast.signedOut: Please sign in again to continue.
toast.forbidden: You do not have permission to do that.
toast.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
toast.orderNotFound: We could not find that order.
toast.proofNotFound: We could not find that payment proof.
toast.proofPurged: That payment proof is no longer available.
toast.inquiryNotFound: We could not find that inquiry.
toast.addressNotFound: We could not find that address.
toast.addressInUse: That address is still used by an order.
toast.orderStateConflict: That order can no longer be changed this way.
toast.fileTooLarge: The selected file is too large.
toast.fileTypeUnsupported: This file type is not supported.
